component.name: TextLink
component.description: Inline hyperlink with permanent underline and brand interactive color. Semibold weight distinguishes it from surrounding body text. Color shifts to a darker brand tone on hover. Always renders as an <a> element — use only for navigation (URL changes), never for in-page actions.

when: Linking an author name, entity, or term inline within a paragraph or metadata line
Any inline navigational link embedded in body copy
When the link destination is a URL and browser navigation semantics (<a href>) are required

patterns.name: author-credit
patterns.description: An author or contributor name linked inline before a role or affiliation label.
patterns.tree: Text(size=body-default, color=subtle) > [TextLink(href=...), ', Author and educator, MICA']

antiPatterns.scenario: Using TextLink for an in-page action (e.g. 'Show more', 'Delete')
antiPatterns.reason: TextLink renders an <a> element. In-page actions that do not change the URL must be <button> elements for correct keyboard and screen-reader semantics.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Button variant='ghost' for low-emphasis in-page text actions.

antiPatterns.reason: An <a> without href loses its interactive role and is not focusable by keyboard.
antiPatterns.alternative: Always supply href. Use Button for actions that do not navigate.

antiPatterns.scenario: Wrapping block-level content (Heading, Card, Stack) inside TextLink
antiPatterns.reason: Interactive content must not contain other interactive content; block elements inside an <a> create invalid HTML.
antiPatterns.alternative: Place the TextLink adjacent to the content, or use a card-level overlay link pattern with a separate invisible <a> spanning the card.

antiPatterns.scenario: Overriding the color or removing the underline via an inline style
antiPatterns.reason: Underline and brand color are the only visual affordances distinguishing a TextLink from surrounding text. Removing either breaks recognisability.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use the size prop for scale adjustments. Never override color or text-decoration.

purpose.body-default: Standard inline link within body copy.
purpose.body-small: Link within smaller supporting text (e.g. captions, footnotes).
purpose.metadata: Link in metadata lines (e.g. lesson count, duration rows).
purpose.label: Link in label-sized UI text (e.g. form helper text).

states.description: Brand interactive color with permanent underline and semibold weight.
Shifts to the darker brand interactive hover color; underline remains.
Browser default focus ring; no custom override.
No visited style override — inherits browser default.

accessibility.notes: Renders a native <a> element. href is always required — omitting it removes the link from the tab order. Do not nest interactive children (buttons, inputs, other links) inside TextLink.
ariaAttributes: aria-label — use when the link text alone is ambiguous (e.g. 'Read more' repeated multiple times on a page)

keyboardInteractions.action: Moves focus to the next focusable element
